name: Dental Care Ireland - AI Receptionist Booking System

nodes.name: Webhook - Receive Vapi Booking
nodes.notes: Entry point. Receives POST from Vapi AI with patient booking data.

nodes.name: Validate & Prepare Data
nodes.notes: Validates all required fields, checks email/phone/date formats, generates booking ID, calculates calendar start/end times.

nodes.name: Validation Passed?
nodes.notes: Routes to error response (400) if validation failed, or continues to booking flow.

nodes.name: Return 400 - Validation Error
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 400 with error details back to Vapi when validation fails.

nodes.name: Prepare Log Entry
nodes.notes: Prepares structured log entry for the Logs sheet before writing to Sheets.

nodes.name: Log Request to Sheets (Logs Tab)
nodes.notes: Writes every incoming booking request to the Logs sheet for debugging/audit.

nodes.name: Log Booking to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Appends booking row to 'Bookings' sheet. Columns: Name, Phone, Email, Service, Date, Time, Status, Timestamp, BookingID. continueOnFail=true so a Sheets outage won't break the whole flow.

additionalFields.location: 15 Watergate Street, Navan, Co. Meath, Ireland

nodes.name: Create Google Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Creates a 30-minute calendar event on the primary calendar. If this node fails, the error branch fires an admin alert and returns HTTP 500 to Vapi.

parameters.subject: Appointment Confirmed - Dental Care Ireland
parameters.message:
=

🦷 Dental Care Ireland

Appointment Confirmation

Hi {{ $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json.name }},

Your appointment at Dental Care Ireland has been confirmed!

📅 Date: {{ $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json.date }}

⏰ Time: {{ $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json.time }}

🦷 Service: {{ $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json.service }}

📍 Location: 15 Watergate Street, Navan, Co. Meath

🆔 Booking ID: {{ $('Validate & Prepare Data').item.json.bookingId }}

If you need to reschedule or cancel, please call us at 046 902 1372.

This is an automated confirmation. Please do not reply to this email.

Dental Care Ireland | 15 Watergate Street, Navan, Co. Meath | 046 902 1372

nodes.name: Send Confirmation Email to Patient
nodes.notes: Sends HTML confirmation email to patient. continueOnFail=true so a mail failure won't cancel the booking.

nodes.name: Return 200 - Success to Vapi
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 200 JSON success response to Vapi so Emma knows booking was created.

nodes.name: Prepare Admin Error Alert
nodes.notes: Runs when Calendar creation fails. Packages error details for admin notification.

parameters.subject: 🚨 Booking System Error - Dental Care Ireland
parameters.message:
=

🚨 Booking System Error

A critical error occurred in the AI Receptionist booking system.

Error Time{{ $json.errorTimestamp }}
Booking ID{{ $json.bookingId }}
Patient Name{{ $json.patientName }}
Patient Phone{{ $json.patientPhone }}
Patient Email{{ $json.patientEmail }}
Service{{ $json.service }}
Date{{ $json.date }}
Time{{ $json.time }}
Failed Node{{ $json.errorSource }}

ACTION REQUIRED: Please manually create this appointment in Google Calendar and contact the patient to confirm.

nodes.name: Send Admin Alert Email
nodes.notes: Emails majesticson297@gmail.com with full booking details when Calendar creation fails.

parameters.responseBody: ={ "status": "error", "message": "Calendar creation failed. Admin has been notified. Please try again or call 046 902 1372." }

nodes.name: Return 500 - Calendar Error
nodes.notes: Returns HTTP 500 to Vapi when calendar creation fails so Emma can inform the patient.
